overall.description: A cinematic tracking shot from Red Dead Redemption 2 follows a steam locomotive traveling through rural countryside. The train passes through foliage and arrives at Riggs Station, with atmospheric morning lighting and detailed Old West architecture.

events.description: leaves and branches briefly obscure the camera lens as it moves through foreground vegetation

agents.ego_description: cinematic camera tracking the steam train from a distance across open grassland

notable_agents.action: steam locomotive emitting thick black smoke as it approaches along the tracks

entered.detail: tall red wooden water tower with metal tank visible against the hazy sky
steel railway tracks cutting through the grassland
hazy blue mountains on the horizon with atmospheric perspective
green leafy trees dotting the rolling hills

segments.scene_description: The camera tracks a steam locomotive approaching from the distance across open grassland. A red water tower stands prominently to the left while mountains rise in the hazy background. At 2.5 seconds, leaves briefly obscure the lens as the camera moves through foreground bushes.

events.description: camera moves from open grassland into denser vegetation alongside the tracks

agents.ego_description: camera continues tracking the train through dense foliage, partially obscured by leaves

notable_agents.action: steam locomotive drawing closer as it travels through the rural landscape

entered.detail: thick green leaves and branches partially blocking the view

segments.scene_description: Moving through dense vegetation, the camera partially obscures the view with leaves and branches. The train grows larger in the frame as it approaches, with the red water tower still visible through the trees on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: Riggs Station platform with wooden buildings

events.description: train emerges from trees and arrives at Riggs Station wooden platform

agents.ego_description: tracking alongside the train as it passes the station platform and buildings

station workers standing on the wooden platform near cargo crates

entered.detail: wooden station building with sloped shingle roof and RIGGS STATION sign
raised wooden train platform with steps and cargo loading area
wooden boxes and freight stacked on the platform

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the trees and arrives at Riggs Station, revealing a wooden platform building with a sloped roof and visible signage. The camera tracks alongside the locomotive as it passes the station, showing workers and cargo crates on the platform while the red water tower shifts to the background.

agents.ego_description: close cinematic tracking of the locomotive as it continues past the station into open country

notable_agents.action: steam locomotive continuing journey with detailed view of engine mechanics and steam

entered.detail: rolling green hills extending to the horizon
split-rail fence running parallel to the tracks

segments.scene_description: Having passed the station, the camera continues tracking the locomotive in close-up detail as it chugs through the open countryside. The red water tower remains visible in the right background while the train emits thick black smoke, with wooden fences and rolling hills filling the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a steam locomotive as it travels from an open grassland through dense foliage and into a rural station. It begins with the train approaching from a distance across a wide plain, passing a prominent red water tower with hazy mountains rising in the background. As the camera moves forward, the view becomes partially obscured by leaves and branches from foreground bushes, creating a sense of enclosure before the train emerges from the vegetation. The scene then opens up at Riggs Station, where the camera tracks alongside the locomotive past a wooden platform building filled with workers and cargo crates. Finally, the camera pulls into a close-up of the engine as it chugs away from the station, emitting thick black smoke while rolling hills and wooden fences stretch across the landscape.
